allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done')
Bash(timeout 20 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')

PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $pid" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3000" })

PowerShell($proc = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3000" })
